data.body: Round-3 plan-review PASSED + signed; claimed. Advisory triage for implementation: (a) Site B swap must replace ALL THREE prev_jira_fields uses under the flag — outer guard 'and prev_jira_fields' (:519), _local_matches_prev arg (:519), AND _jira_matches_prev arg (:524) — all -> baseline. (b) LOUD alert channel for GC-deleted-unrecoverable = the existing alert_store bridge-alert path (same as 9622's recovery/conflict alerts). (c) mid-heal abort injection + decision_census consumer audit are operational-step details, handled at heal/census time. (d) gh run view --log captures stderr (GHA merges stdout+stderr in job logs) — the RECON: baseline_shadow_check stderr line is thus grep-able. CODE lands this session; OPERATIONAL gate (>=10 clean passes, ~3+hrs) accrues across sessions, so B1 stays open after code lands.
